metadata.title: Citations
metadata.description: Automatically search and insert citations from a Zotero library

regex.target: Notice('此参考文献没有关联的PDF文件。')

regex.source:

regex.target:
.error("引文插件：加载 BibLaTeX 条目时发生致命错误" +

regex.source: name: 'Insert literature note content in the current pane'
regex.target: name: '在当前窗格中插入文献笔记内容'
text: '正在加载引文数据库。请稍候...'

regex.source: text: 'The citation export file cannot be found. Please check the path above.'
regex.target: text: '找不到引文导出文件。请检查上方路径。'
text: '已加载包含 {{n}} 条参考文献的文献库。'

regex.source: text: ' syntax. You can make reference to the following variables:'
regex.target: text: ' 语法解析，您在在编写时可引用以下变量：'

regex.source: text: 'You can insert Pandoc-style Markdown citations rather than literature notes by using the "Insert Markdown citation" command. The below options allow customization of the Markdown citation format.'
regex.target: text: '您可以使用"插入Markdown引文"命令插入Pandoc风格的Markdown引文（而非文献笔记）。以下选项允许自定义Markdown引文格式。'
.setText("已加载包含 " + this.plugin.library.size + " 条参考文献的文献库。")

regex.source:
.setDesc('Path to citation library exported by your reference manager. ' +
            'Can be an absolute path or a path relative to the current vault root folder. ' +
            'Citations will be automatically reloaded whenever this file updates.')
regex.target: .setDesc('由文献管理软件导出的引文库路径' +            '可以是绝对路径或相对于当前知识库根目录的路径，' +            '文件更新时将自动重新加载引文。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Save literature note files in this folder within your vault. If empty, notes will be stored in the root directory of the vault.')
regex.target: .setDesc('将文献笔记文件保存在知识库中的此文件夹内。若为空，笔记将存储在知识库根目录。')

regex.source: this.error(new ParserError(`no cleanup method for ${this.show(node)}`, node), this.text());
regex.target: this.error(new ParserError(`没有名为 ${this.show(node)}的清理方法`, node), this.text());

regex.target: '您可以为每种类型的内容指定自定义模板。'
